one_time_description: Federal settlement with Canada ratified June 2022, $135 million received November 2022; $130M placed in trust, $5M distributed to members ($3,152,438 member distributions)
economic_notes: Nation operates multiple business enterprises including Borland Creek Logging Ltd., Sugar Cane Development Corporation, Sugarcane Petroleum Products Corporation, Sugar Cane TreadPro Limited, Chief William RV-Campsite Ltd., Coyote Rock GP Ltd., Coyote Rock LP, Unity Cannabis LP, Sugar Cane Cannabis LP, Williams Lake Community Forest LP. $130M settlement funds invested in pooled mutual funds yielding $3,867,984 in dividends/interest. Nation building 5 member-built homes.
notes: Major one-time item: $135M federal settlement received November 2022 (recorded as $130M in statement of operations). $130M placed in BMO-administered trust invested in pooled mutual funds. Nation equity jumped from $53.8M to $194.7M. 10 business enterprises accounted for by modified equity method (not fully consolidated). Fiscal year end is March 31, 2023 not 2024. No schedule of remuneration provided. total_government_transfers estimated from ISC ($9,754,130) + Government of Canada ($6,040,007) + Province of BC ($4,445,085) + CMHC ($15,000) + FNESC ($331,970) + Northern Shuswap Treaty Society ($434,014) + Three Corners Health Services Society ($316,504) + First Nations Health Authority ($314,260) + Northern Shuswap Tribal Council ($11,366) + Northern Development Initiatives Trust ($90,167) + New Relationship Trust ($20,000) + CCATEC ($95254) + Knucwentwecw Society ($317,500) - but Deloitte Drinking Water Settlement $500,000 may also be government transfer. OSR calculated as total revenue minus estimated government transfers.
